# Carnot Protocol
> The world's most advanced provably-fair tap-trading prediction market on Solana. Every settlement batch is verified by a ZK proof — outcomes are trustless and auditable.

- [Account & Payments](https://carnot.finance/documentation/api/account-payments)
- [Authentication](https://carnot.finance/documentation/api/authentication)
- [Settlement API (Keeper)](https://carnot.finance/documentation/api/settlement)

- [WebSocket Events](https://carnot.finance/documentation/api/websocket)
- [Backend Architecture](https://carnot.finance/documentation/backend/architecture)
